title: Approving a Refund
content:
Overview


Refund approvals are straightforward but must follow procedure. Agents document the request and set expectations — only the Lead processes the actual refund. Never promise a refund will be approved until eligibility is confirmed.



Eligibility Checklist


Before submitting a refund request, verify all three conditions:


  • ✅ The request is within 72 hours (3 days) of purchase.
  • ✅ No sessions have been booked.
  • ✅ No package credits have been used.

If all conditions are met, the customer is eligible for a refund minus a 10% administrative fee.



How to Communicate the Approval


Step 1 — Confirm eligibility:


"I've reviewed your account, and it looks like you're within our 72-hour refund window and no sessions have been booked. Great news — you're eligible for a refund."


Step 2 — Mention the admin fee:


"Just so you're aware, there is a 10% administrative fee that applies to all refunds. So on your [package] purchase of $[amount], you'll receive $[90% amount] back. This covers our payment processing costs."


Step 3 — Set timeline expectations:


"I'm documenting your refund request now. Our team will process it within 5 to 10 business days, and the funds will be returned to your original payment method. You'll receive a confirmation email once it's completed."


Step 4 — Leave the door open:


"Even though you're getting a refund today, we'd love to see you back. Your account stays open, and if you ever want to book a session in the future, we're here for you."



Processing Procedure


  1. Verify the customer's identity using standard security checks.
  2. Confirm eligibility — check purchase date, booked sessions, and credit usage in User Lookup.
  3. Create a ticket under Billing category with the subject: "Refund Approved — [customer email] — [package type]".
  4. Document the purchase date, package type, purchase amount, refund amount (after 10% fee), and confirmation that no sessions were booked or credits used.
  5. Inform the customer: "Your refund has been submitted for processing. You'll receive an email confirmation within 5-10 business days."
  6. Leave the ticket open. The Lead completes the refund and resolves the ticket.


Key Phrases


  • "Great news — your purchase qualifies for a refund under our policy."
  • "The refund will be processed within 5 to 10 business days."
  • "You'll receive $[amount] back to your original payment method."
  • "We'd love to have you back whenever you're ready."
  • Never say: "The refund is done" — you're submitting a request, not processing it yourself.
